title: Acer Palmatum 'Peve Dave' - Compact Bush with Dark Red Lobed Leaves & Stunning Autumn Colour - 1X 3 Litre Pot by Thompson & Morgan
features: Compact bush with striking dark red lobed leaves
Hardy perennial suitable for various garden settings
Ideal for small gardens or containers
description: Acer Palmatum 'Peve Dave' is a charming and compact Japanese Maple with striking dark red, lobed leaves that provide year-round interest. This hardy perennial is known for its beautiful red autumn colour, adding vibrant hues to your garden as the seasons change. Perfect for small gardens, rockeries, or containers, 'Peve Dave' offers a unique and attractive feature with its dense, compact form. Ideal for adding colour and texture to your outdoor space, this Japanese Maple is a low-maintenance choice that thrives in various garden settings. Its elegant foliage and seasonal display make it a must-have for any garden enthusiast looking for a compact and beautiful shrub. How to Grow: Light: Prefers partial shade to protect delicate leaves. Temperature: Hardy in UK climates. Watering: Keep soil evenly moist but not waterlogged. Feeding: Apply a balanced fertiliser in spring. Humidity: Adapts well to standard garden conditions. Images shown are for guidance only and show the expected results of plants upon maturity. Different growing conditions might vary results. Image may be included for illustration of supply but can vary due to seasonality changes (e.g. deciduous plants lose leaves in colder months). Decorative pots are not supplied.
